dimensions.name: Git Forensic Analysis
dimensions.forensic_instruction: Inspect commit history for atomic, narrative commits.
dimensions.success_pattern: Commit history shows progression with >3 atomic commits.
dimensions.failure_pattern: Too few commits or large monolithic dumps.

dimensions.name: State Management Rigor
dimensions.forensic_instruction: Check src/state.py for TypedDict and Pydantic rigor.
dimensions.success_pattern: State defined with TypedDict and validated via Pydantic.

dimensions.name: Graph Orchestration
dimensions.success_pattern: Detectives run in parallel, aggregated, then judges run in parallel.

dimensions.name: Safe Tool Engineering
dimensions.forensic_instruction: Check src/tools for sandboxing and error handling.
dimensions.success_pattern: Tools use subprocess safely, errors caught.
dimensions.failure_pattern: Direct unsafe calls or missing error handling.

dimensions.name: Structured Output Enforcement
dimensions.forensic_instruction: Check outputs for Pydantic models and Markdown serialization.
dimensions.success_pattern: Evidence, Opinions, Reports all typed and serialized.

dimensions.name: PDF Theoretical Depth
dimensions.forensic_instruction: Analyze report for key concepts (Dialectical Synthesis, Fan-In/Fan-Out, Metacognition).

dimensions.name: Host Analysis Accuracy
dimensions.forensic_instruction: Check if report references files that exist in repo.

dimensions.name: Diagram Flow Analysis
dimensions.forensic_instruction: Inspect diagrams for Digital Courtroom architecture.
dimensions.success_pattern: Diagram shows Detectives → Aggregator → Judges → Chief Justice.

dimensions.name: Judicial Nuance
dimensions.forensic_instruction: Check judges for distinct reasoning styles.
dimensions.success_pattern: Prosecutor critical, Defense optimistic, TechLead pragmatic.

dimensions.name: Synthesis & Conflict Resolution
dimensions.forensic_instruction: Check Chief Justice synthesis for dissent handling.
dimensions.success_pattern: Conflicts resolved with clear rules, dissent summarized.
